title: Relay Fork Sync Configuration
description: Configuration for syncing this fork with upstream. Used by the fork-sync GitHub workflow.

enabled.description: Enable automatic fork sync. Set to true only if this is a fork.

syncSchedule.description: Cron schedule for automatic sync (default: daily at 6:00 UTC)

reapplyPatches.description: After sync, attempt to re-apply active patches from .relay/features/*/patch.md

manageUpstreamIssues.description: Create/update issues and PRs in the upstream repo for each active patch

conflictStrategy.description: How to handle merge conflicts during sync
